limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex or dedicated AI budget figures appear in the excerpts; total R&D of $991M is disclosed but not disaggregated by AI vs. other initiatives, preventing a score of 4 or 5 for investment intensity
AI narrative concreteness scored 4 (deployed with operating detail) rather than 5 because no quantified business results (%, $, time saved, volume) are provided for the named AI products

Risk disclosure scored 4 because specific mechanisms (regulatory penalties, revenue impact, compliance cost) are described, but no quantified risk exposure or named governance oversight body is disclosed
